title: atriplex belangeri
intro: Atriplex belangeri, also known as Belanger's saltbush, is a plant species in the Amaranthaceae family that is native to the Americas. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Atriplex belangeri include its ability to help lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and act as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of Atriplex belangeri include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health conditions.
